category_sources: source_facts.description says tool for managing JavaScript projects with multiple packages; official Lerna docs describe creating and managing package workspaces.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is lerna; official docs and GitHub repository use Lerna.
docs_sources: Official lerna.js.org documentation provides getting started and feature documentation.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository is linked from lerna.js.org and describes Lerna as the build system for managing/publishing multiple JS/TS packages.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official Lerna GitHub README and docs describe JS/TS monorepo package management.
